# Code RED source/decompiled export
# Source: related_apps/Code_RED_ScriptHookRDR_AI_Menu/install_diagnostic_only_menu_data_windows.ps1
# SHA1: fceda794d88cea83cfc9e7fa70597b8f3d0da752

<#
Install Code RED AI Menu diagnostic-only data beside the game executable.

Use when any spawn action crashes the game. This keeps the ASI/menu data alive
but disables actor creation, vehicle creation, movement tasks, combat tasks, and
faction edits.

Run from repo root:
  powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File related_apps\Code_RED_ScriptHookRDR_AI_Menu\install_diagnostic_only_menu_data_windows.ps1 -GameRoot "D:\Games\Red Dead Redemption"
#>

param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory=$true)]
    [string]$GameRoot
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$GameRoot = (Resolve-Path $GameRoot).Path
$DataDest = Join-Path $GameRoot "data\codered"
$Scratch = Join-Path $GameRoot "scratch"
$BackupRoot = Join-Path $GameRoot "data\codered_backups"
$Stamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"
$BackupDir = Join-Path $BackupRoot "diagnostic_only_backup_$Stamp"
$IniPath = Join-Path $GameRoot "CodeRED_AI_Menu.ini"

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $DataDest | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $Scratch | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $BackupDir | Out-Null

foreach ($name in @("npc_roster.txt", "ai_behavior_actions.csv", "actor_enum_map.csv")) {
    $src = Join-Path $DataDest $name
    if (Test-Path $src) {
        Copy-Item -Path $src -Destination (Join-Path $BackupDir $name) -Force
    }
}

$roster = @"
# CodeRED diagnostic-only roster
# Spawn is disabled. This file exists only so the menu can display without old data.
# Do not use this roster for spawning until the ASI source is guarded.

DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NO_SPAWN
"@
$roster | Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $DataDest "npc_roster.txt") -Encoding UTF8

$actions = @"
action,label,category,enabled,notes
status_request,Status / Native Bridge Check,debug,1,Safe diagnostic action only; no actor creation or task native calls
dismiss_ai_guest_request,Dismiss Tracked Actors,cleanup,1,Safe cleanup action for any previously tracked CodeRED actors
spawn_selected_npc_request,Spawn Selected Actor / Vehicle,spawn,0,DISABLED after repeated crashes; raw CREATE_ACTOR_IN_LAYOUT path is unsafe until guarded in the ASI source
regroup_near_player_request,Regroup Near Player,behavior,0,Disabled after repeated crashes; requires valid spawned actors and movement/task natives
idle_spawned_request,Idle Spawned Actors,behavior,0,Disabled after repeated crashes; requires valid spawned actors and task natives
follow_player_request,Follow Player,behavior,0,Disabled while isolating ASI crash source
guard_position_request,Stand Guard,behavior,0,Disabled while isolating ASI crash source
wander_spawned_request,Wander Spawned Actors,behavior,0,Disabled while isolating ASI crash source
make_spawned_lawmen_request,Make Spawned Actors Lawmen,faction,0,Disabled while isolating ASI crash source
side_lawman_immunity_request,Join Lawman Side,faction,0,Disabled while isolating ASI crash source
side_gang_immunity_request,Join Gang Side,faction,0,Disabled while isolating ASI crash source
restore_player_faction_request,Restore Player Faction,faction,0,Disabled while isolating ASI crash source
attack_nearest_hostile_request,Attack Nearest Hostile,combat,0,Disabled while isolating ASI crash source
"@
$actions | Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $DataDest "ai_behavior_actions.csv") -Encoding UTF8

$actorMap = @"
# CodeRED diagnostic-only actor enum map
label,actor_enum,category,source,aliases,notes
DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NO_SPAWN,1,diagnostic,CodeRED diagnostic-only installer,NO_SPAWN|diagnostic_only,placeholder only; spawn action disabled
ACTOR_VEHICLE_Car01,1194,vehicle_blocked,CodeRED unsafe raw spawn note,ACTOR_VEHICLE_CAR01|VEHICLE_Car01|vehicle_car01,blocked_from_default_roster=true; crashed_with_raw_CREATE_ACTOR_IN_LAYOUT; use WGD/gringo lane
ACTOR_VEHICLE_Truck01,1193,vehicle_blocked,CodeRED unsafe raw spawn note,ACTOR_VEHICLE_TRUCK01|VEHICLE_Truck01|vehicle_truck01,blocked_from_default_roster=true; use WGD/gringo lane
"@
$actorMap | Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $DataDest "actor_enum_map.csv") -Encoding UTF8

$ini = @"
[paths]
roster=data/codered/npc_roster.txt
actor_enum_map=data/codered/actor_enum_map.csv
behavior_actions=data/codered/ai_behavior_actions.csv
action_plan=scratch/codered_ai_action_plan.json
"@
$ini | Set-Content -Path $IniPath -Encoding UTF8

$report = [ordered]@{
    installed = (Get-Date).ToString('s')
    game_root = $GameRoot
    data_dest = $DataDest
    backup_dir = $BackupDir
    mode = "diagnostic_only"
    enabled_actions = @("status_request", "dismiss_ai_guest_request")
    disabled_actions = @("spawn_selected_npc_request", "regroup_near_player_request", "idle_spawned_request", "follow_player_request", "guard_position_request", "wander_spawned_request", "make_spawned_lawmen_request", "side_lawman_immunity_request", "side_gang_immunity_request", "restore_player_faction_request", "attack_nearest_hostile_request")
    note = "Diagnostic-only AI menu data installed. Spawn/task/faction actions disabled after repeated crashes."
}
$reportPath = Join-Path $DataDest "diagnostic_only_install_report.json"
$report | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -Path $reportPath -Encoding UTF8

Write-Host "# Code RED Diagnostic-Only Menu Data Installed"
Write-Host "GameRoot:" $GameRoot
Write-Host "Data:" $DataDest
Write-Host "Backup:" $BackupDir
Write-Host "Enabled actions: status_request, dismiss_ai_guest_request"
Write-Host "Spawn actions are disabled. If the game still crashes, unload/rename the ASI next."
Write-Host "Report:" $reportPath
